predictions.reasoning: DSGVO Art. 32 explicitly requires controllers and processors to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures; ISMS capability directly governs security policies and risk treatment aligned with this mandate.
Encryption is a core technical measure required by Art. 32 to protect personal data against unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration and loss; this service directly implements such protection.
Art. 32 requires measures to protect against data destruction and loss; backup and restore procedures are essential technical controls for ensuring availability and recovery of personal data.
CRM system processes and stores personal data (customer master data, contact history); Art. 32 requires appropriate security measures for all systems handling personal data subject to DSGVO.
